steps.title: Translate the finding
steps.content: A higher IWCI score means higher waterbird community integrity. The researchers found that bulkheads are more negatively correlated with integrity than riprap, so the clearest illustration should compare a bulkhead-heavy site with a riprap-heavy site and show lower integrity at the bulkhead site.

steps.title: Eliminate weak comparisons
steps.content: A compares two bulkhead-heavy sites. C combines bulkheads and riprap, so it cannot isolate the difference. D does not establish that the lower-scoring site is bulkhead-heavy. The answer is B.
